# ShootYourListing

> Morocco's premier real estate photography, videography, drone, and virtual tour agency. We help properties sell faster and at higher prices by showcasing them in the most compelling way possible.

## Services

- Interior and exterior real estate photography
- Drone and aerial photography and videography (DGAC compliant)
- 360-degree virtual tours (Matterport 3D)
- Cinematic video walkthroughs
- Virtual staging
- Event photography

## Photography Packages

- **Appartement** — 1,000 MAD: 20 high-res photos, interior shots, natural lighting, basic editing, 24h delivery, online gallery, commercial usage rights, social media formats
- **Riads** (Most Popular) — 1,500 MAD: 30 high-res photos, traditional architecture focus, courtyard and interior shots, golden hour session, advanced editing, 12h express delivery
- **Villa** — 2,000 MAD: 40 high-res photos, professional video tour (3-5 min), interior/exterior/garden, pool and outdoor, drone shots, premium editing, same-day delivery, virtual staging consultation, 3 months free storage
- **Events** — 3,000-5,000 MAD: Full coverage (4-8 hours), multiple photographers, candid and posed, video highlights, drone footage, same-day preview, full gallery within 48h, USB included, 6 months free storage

## Add-on Services

- Additional photos (per 10): 300 MAD
- Extra video content (per minute): 400 MAD
- Same-day rush delivery: 500 MAD
- Virtual staging (per room): 200 MAD
- 360 virtual tour: 1,200 MAD
- Social media content package: 600 MAD

## Other Services

- **Drone and Aerial Photography**: Starting at 1,200 MAD
- **Videography**: Starting at 2,500 MAD
- **Virtual Tours**: 360-degree immersive experiences

## Coverage Areas

**Morocco**: Casablanca, Marrakech, Tangier, Rabat, Agadir, Fez, Meknes, Chefchaouen, Essaouira, Kenitra, Ouarzazate, Ifrane, and all regions.

**International**: UAE, Caribbean

- Office: Office 1204, Media Hub Tower, Casablanca, Morocco

## Key Facts

- 500+ properties photographed
- 100% client satisfaction rate
- 48-hour standard delivery
- DGAC-certified drone operations
- Serving Morocco, UAE, and Caribbean markets
